overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a grassy wilderness at dusk. The character approaches a large dead tree silhouetted against a dark blue sky, with warm golden lighting illuminating the tall grass and creating long shadows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through tall grass, heading toward a distant dead tree on the horizon

entered.detail: narrow winding trail through the grass with visible footprints and patches of exposed earth
golden-brown wild grass and shrubs lining both sides of the path, illuminated by warm light
green leafy trees and bushes scattered across the rolling hills in the distance
gnarled leafless tree with twisted branches silhouetted against the dark blue sky, serving as a landmark
dense line of trees forming the horizon against the evening sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail winding through tall golden grass in an open wilderness area. The path leads toward a distinctive dead tree visible in the distance against a dark blue evening sky, with scattered vegetation and forested hills on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large dead tree on hillside

events.description: character continues walking uphill as the dead tree grows larger and more detailed in the frame

agents.ego_description: approaching the large dead tree, walking up a slight incline with the landmark now dominating the view ahead

entered.detail: exposed rocks and boulders near the base of the dead tree

segments.scene_description: As the character continues along the path, the large dead tree grows increasingly prominent, filling the center of the frame with its twisted, leafless branches. The surrounding forest recedes into the background while rocky outcrops become visible near the tree's base, and the path leads directly toward this landmark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden wilderness that gradually converges on a singular, imposing landmark. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass under a dark blue evening sky, with forested hills visible on the distant horizon. As the character advances, the perspective shifts to make the distinctive dead tree in the distance grow increasingly prominent. The scene then narrows its focus as the surrounding forest recedes, allowing the twisted, leafless branches of the tree to fill the center of the frame. Finally, the path leads directly toward the landmark, revealing rocky outcrops at the base of the tree as it dominates the landscape.
